description: Coulson starts to notice off behavior from the imposter May, testing her by suggesting coffee—a suggestion the real May would decline. Realizing the ruse, Coulson attacks the deception, leading to a confrontation. The real May breaks free from Bakshi’s clutches and rushes to intervene, culminating in a dramatic showdown where May fights her duplicate while Coulson faces Bakshi.

transcript.line: Hopefully, this isn't some kind of trap Talbot's set for us.
Yeah. It's been nice working together again, hasn't it?
Just you and me, like the old days.

You know... all this nostalgic talk has me thinking... maybe this will sound weird, but how about when this is over, you and I finally go get that cup of coffee we were supposed to get all those years back?
See? So it's like a... a small disease.
